result:
**2026-07-19 Infrastructure Operations Summary (Compressed)**

**Scope:** Routine maintenance across 15 microservices (search-indexer, export-pipeline, payment-gateway, auth-service, notification-daemon, ingest-api, webhook-relay, cache-warmer, audit-logger, session-manager, report-builder, metrics-collector, billing-worker, scheduler-core, user-profile-service) deployed across 7 environments (production, staging, dev sandbox, QA cluster, canary, blue/green pools).

**Overall Outcomes (Full Day):**
- Hundreds of routine operations (reconfiguration, scaling, patching, rolling back, draining, health-checks, upgrades, restarts, migrations) executed across multiple timestamps
- Majority completed without errors or with normal latency
- ~15-20% of operations required manual retries (primarily: auth-service green pool, user-profile-service staging, audit-logger green pool, cache-warmer canary, payment-gateway green/production, metrics-collector staging, export-pipeline green pool, scheduler-core dev sandbox/staging, cache-warmer staging, ingest-api QA cluster)
- All smoke tests passed where run; all threshold reviews deferred to next week
- Alert clearing operations successful across multiple services
- Memory pressure reduced in: ingest-api dev sandbox, search-indexer production, metrics-collector production, audit-logger staging, report-builder green pool, ingest-api production
- CPU returned to baseline post-operation throughout
- Error rates stabilized; retry queues normalized to zero; queue depth unchanged in most scaling operations
- No customer impact observed; pager remained quiet throughout day

**Configuration Tidying Tasks Filed:**
- auth-service canary, session-manager green pool, search-indexer green pool, report-builder QA cluster, audit-logger green pool, billing-worker blue pool, notification-daemon canary, cache-warmer QA cluster

**Threshold Reviews Scheduled Next Week:**
- payment-gateway, session-manager dev sandbox, billing-worker dev sandbox, cache-warmer canary, search-indexer QA cluster, report-builder staging, notification-daemon QA cluster, user-profile-service dev sandbox, export-pipeline green pool

**Documentation Updates:**
- Runbooks updated with new procedures and postmortem notes archived for several operations (export-pipeline green pool, report-builder staging, audit-logger production downgrade, ingest-api QA cluster patched, cache-warmer QA cluster restarted, session-manager staging patched)

**Final Status:** All systems operational by end of day. No critical incidents. Infrastructure stabilized. Ready for next assignment.

**Note:** No active OSS contribution work in progress; workspace separate from this operational context.
